projectDescription: A Flask-based web application for managing official government documents (oficios) with role-based workflows for Gestores, Subdirectores, JUDs, and Administrators.
keyFeatures: Role-based access control with four user roles: Gestor, Subdirector, JUD, and Administrator
Full oficio lifecycle management from creation to resolution with status tracking
Automatic PDF stamping with receipt acknowledgment (acuse de recibido) on document upload
Email notifications at each workflow step (new oficio, assignment to JUD, peticiones)
Peticiones workflow allowing JUDs and Subdirectores to make requests up the hierarchy
Per-role dashboards with KPI metrics (Enviados, En Revisión, Finalizados, etc.)
File attachment support for oficios and peticiones (PDF, DOC, Excel, images)
Sequential consecutive folio numbering system per year with concurrency safety
Admin panel for user management (create, soft-delete) and oficio oversight
publicApiSurface: GET/POST /oficios/crear_oficio — Create a new oficio (Gestor only)
GET/POST /oficios/reasignar_oficio/<id> — Review and assign oficio to JUD (Subdirector only)
POST /oficios/turnar_oficio_a_jud/<id> — Formally assign oficio to JUD
GET/POST /oficios/atender_oficio/<id> — Respond to an oficio (JUD only)
GET/POST /oficios/responder_peticion_de_jud/<id> — Respond to JUD petition (Subdirector only)
GET/POST /oficios/responder_peticion_subdirector/<id> — Respond to Subdirector petition (Gestor only)
GET /oficios/api/subdirector/<id_area> — AJAX: get subdirector data by area
POST /admin/eliminar_oficio/<id> — Delete oficio and files (Admin only)
